Title: Enacts the "no gambling ads for kids act"
Summary: Enacts the "no gambling ads for kids act" under which certain covered platforms and social media platforms are prohibited from advertising a service permitting gaming-related gambling, predictive market wagering, online sweepstakes gaming, sports-related gambling, and/or traditional online gambling to minors.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to enacting the "no gambling ads for kids act"
